title: [codereview-pass2-security] TDMA rendezvous spec: beacon signature verification timing not specified (side-channel risk?), join rate limiting/PoW details vague, no mention of root key rotation or compromised root detection in drift/beacon path
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:80-95, 140-150 - Security properties of TDMA sync must be analyzed per draft-lichen-security. Root beacon is single point of failure for time/auth. Discovered in security-focused review pass.
